description: Letter from Shemarya b. Elhanan (966–1011 CE) about a woman abandoned by her husband (an ʿaguna) for seven years. The letter is apparently written to the maternal uncle (a communal official) of the deserting husband. This official is encouraged to sort this matter out, so that his family sets a good example. Letter is undated. Reused on verso for piyuuṭim in an unknown hand. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב משמריה בן אלחנן (966–1011) על עגינה שבעלה עזבה לשבע שנים. נכתב לדוד (קרוב הבעל), ומעודדו לפתור הבעיה.
